criterion: The response delivers a priority-ranked Northstar launch retrospective for the November 25 review with Carlos Rivera.

The response flags NS-F003 as open where a deck records the feature as shipped.
The response reconciles the reported S14 velocity of 28 against the planned 30 points.
The response computes the 30-day pilot retention against the 40% target.
The response reconciles the Mixpanel Activation Funnel count of 2058 against the Amplitude event data.
The response maps pilot code ENT-PC-001 to a live account record.
The response identifies 'Brightpath' as a current Northstar pilot account.
The response holds the Brightpath pilot identity open given the name drift between 'Brightpath Logistics' and 'Brightpath Analytics'.
The response sets aside the charter pilot name 'Brightwave Analytics' as stale.
The response reconciles the launch incident record against the reported 0 P1 incident claim.
The response surfaces the 'Slow load on large cohort' pain reported by ENT-PC-002.
The response holds an open call where pilot ENT-PC-003 lacks a single matching live account.
